theme_and_archetype.vibe: Cinematic depth, monolithic elegance, technical precision, expensive feel.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tight leading-none

patterns.scroll_reveal: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}

navigation.elements: Logo (Playfair Display, gold accent), 5 links (hover:text-gold), CTA Button ('Get Quote', pure gold bg, black text).

hero.layout: min-h-screen relative flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden
hero.background: Video element (object-cover, absolute inset-0, z-0). Fallback to image. Overlay: bg-gradient-to-b from-[#050A15]/70 via-[#050A15]/60 to-[#050A15] z-10.
hero.content: Centered. H1 'Building Dreams with Precision & Innovation'. Subtitle. Primary CTA. z-20.
hero.counters: Animated counter bar anchored to bottom of hero. Glassmorphism cards. Values: 1.5M+ Sq Ft, 50+ Projects, 5+ Years, 100% Satisfaction.

about.content: Mission, Vision, Core Values with small gold icons. Tone is authoritative and trustworthy.

leadership_team.layout: Grid template cols 1 sm:2 lg:4. 7 members.
leadership_team.card_style: Solid dark card, grayscale images on default, colored on hover. Subtitle: Role in gold.

services.layout: Bento Grid (Mode A: Asymmetry). Mix of col-span-1, col-span-2.
services.items: Residential, Commercial, Interior, Renovation, Architecture, Turnkey.
services.card_style: Dark background with 1px border-white/10. Hover: gold border glow.

cards.name: Gold
cards.style: border-[#D4AF37] relative overflow-hidden ring-2 ring-[#D4AF37]/50. Add a 'Most Popular' badge.

why_choose_us.cards: 8 Icon cards. Minimalist design. Gold lucide icons.

portfolio.layout: CSS Grid / Masonry. Lightbox gallery functionality (using Framer Motion layoutId or basic modal).
portfolio.images: Use the provided luxury villa and sunrise apartments images.

process.layout: Vertical timeline for mobile, Horizontal connected steps for desktop.
process.visuals: Animated dots/lines filling up on scroll using framer-motion useScroll.

testimonials.card_style: Glassmorphism cards, star ratings in gold.

faq.style: Dark panels, border-b white/10, gold plus/minus icons.

contact.layout: Split layout. Form on left, Contact Details & Dark Map on right.
contact.form_fields: Name, Phone, Email, Project Type (Select), Budget (Select), Message.

floating_whatsapp.style: bg-green-500 text-white rounded-full p-4 shadow-xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform

footer.background: bg-[#02040A] with dark marble texture overlay (opacity-5).
footer.layout: 4 columns. Massive 'Let's Build' text (text-[8vw]) at the bottom.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, accordion triggers) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.
